description: Autonomous sprint driver. Type one goal, click GO once, walk away. The agent decomposes the goal into tasks (or reads a sprint plan), executes each task end-to-end (plan → implement → verify → auto-fix on failure with Reflexion-style bounded retries, max 3 cycles), auto-commits per task with semantic messages, runs the full integration suite at sprint end, and opens a PR. Zero mid-run gates. Bounded retries instead of human escalation. Always exits with something — partial PR if it hit a hard blocker, full PR if it shipped. Invoked as /agent-pipeline-claude:run.
name: agent-pipeline-claude
